title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - JioMart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the JioMart family as a Marketplace Manager in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About JioMart:
JioMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JioMart!
